body:
Oceananigans closes NetCDF files after running a simulation via `run!` but in some cases, e.g. #862 (and in the case of the examples), we want to run for a bit then plot then run some more, so we actually don't want to close NetCDF files at the end of `run!(simulation)`.

This PR changes the behaviour of `run!` so it does not close NetCDF files.

Resolves #862 

cc @mukund-gupta
title: Dont close output writers at the end of `run!`

body:
Resolves #857 

Minimal working example:
```julia
using Oceananigans, Oceananigans.Diagnostics, Oceananigans.AbstractOperations
grid = RegularCartesianGrid(size=(16, 16, 16), extent=(1, 1, 1))
model = IncompressibleModel(architecture=CPU(), grid=grid)  # Same with GPU()
u, v, w = model.velocities
∫uv = Average(u*v, dims=(1, 2), return_type=Array)
```

Old error (obscure and not useful to users):
```
ERROR: MethodError: no method matching architecture(::Oceananigans.AbstractOperations.MultiaryOperation{Oceananigans.Grids.Face,Oceananigans.Grids.Cell,Oceananigans.Grids.Cell,2,typeof(*),Tuple{OffsetArrays.OffsetArray{Float64,3,Array{Float64,3}},OffsetArrays.OffsetArray{Float64,3,Array{Float64,3}}},Tuple{typeof(identity),typeof(Oceananigans.Operators.ℑxyᶠᶜᵃ)},RegularCartesianGrid{Float64,Periodic,Periodic,Bounded,OffsetArrays.OffsetArray{Float64,1,StepRangeLen{Float64,Base.TwicePrecision{Float64},Base.TwicePrecision{Float64}}}}})
Closest candidates are:
  architecture(::Array) at /home/alir/Oceananigans.jl/src/Architectures.jl:46
  architecture(::CUDA.CuArray) at /home/alir/Oceananigans.jl/src/Architectures.jl:47
  architecture(::Field) at /home/alir/Oceananigans.jl/src/Fields/field.jl:167
  ...
Stacktrace:
 [1] Average(::Oceananigans.AbstractOperations.MultiaryOperation{Oceananigans.Grids.Face,Oceananigans.Grids.Cell,Oceananigans.Grids.Cell,2,typeof(*),Tuple{OffsetArrays.OffsetArray{Float64,3,Array{Float64,3}},OffsetArrays.OffsetArray{Float64,3,Array{Float64,3}}},Tuple{typeof(identity),typeof(Oceananigans.Operators.ℑxyᶠᶜᵃ)},RegularCartesianGrid{Float64,Periodic,Periodic,Bounded,OffsetArrays.OffsetArray{Float64,1,StepRangeLen{Float64,Base.TwicePrecision{Float64},Base.TwicePrecision{Float64}}}}}; dims::Tuple{Int64,Int64}, iteration_interval::Nothing, time_interval::Nothing, return_type::Type{T} where T) at /home/alir/Oceananigans.jl/src/Diagnostics/average.jl:52
 [2] top-level scope at REPL[17]:1
```

New error (more useful):
```
ERROR: MethodError: no method matching Average(::Oceananigans.AbstractOperations.MultiaryOperation{Oceananigans.Grids.Face,Oceananigans.Grids.Cell,Oceananigans.Grids.Cell,2,typeof(*),Tuple{OffsetArrays.OffsetArray{Float64,3,Array{Float64,3}},OffsetArrays.OffsetArray{Float64,3,Array{Float64,3}}},Tuple{typeof(identity),typeof(Oceananigans.Operators.ℑxyᶠᶜᵃ)},RegularCartesianGrid{Float64,Periodic,Periodic,Bounded,OffsetArrays.OffsetArray{Float64,1,StepRangeLen{Float64,Base.TwicePrecision{Float64},Base.TwicePrecision{Float64}}}}}; dims=(1, 2), return_type=Array)
Closest candidates are:
  Average(::Oceananigans.AbstractOperations.AbstractOperation, ::Oceananigans.Models.AbstractModel; dims, kwargs...) at /home/alir/Oceananigans.jl/src/AbstractOperations/computations.jl:98
  Average(::Oceananigans.AbstractOperations.AbstractOperation, ::Any; dims, kwargs...) at /home/alir/Oceananigans.jl/src/AbstractOperations/computations.jl:86
  Average(::F, ::D, ::P, ::I, ::T, ::Float64, ::R) where {F, R, D, P, I, T} at /home/alir/Oceananigans.jl/src/Diagnostics/average.jl:13 got unsupported keyword arguments "dims", "return_type"
  ...
Stacktrace:
 [1] top-level scope at REPL[10]:1
```
title: Clearer error in operation average constructor
